notes:
## Bug 7 fix — auditDiscoveryUnlocks false positives for valid location-ID keys

### Amended-.md hard rule honored
Before editing, the inline documentation block at discoveryUnlocks.js:14-21 was read and confirmed:

  "IMPORTANT — audit compatibility note:
   runtimeAudit.auditDiscoveryUnlocks() validates keys against regions.js IDs
   (arizona, andes, arabian, etc.). These keys are WORLD_LOCATIONS IDs
   (locationIds from worldMapData.js), which is the correct granularity for
   per-location discovery events. The audit check is therefore too coarse and
   will report errors for these valid keys. A future cycle should update
   auditDiscoveryUnlocks() to also accept worldMapData location IDs.
   See: src/renderer/game/systems/runtimeAudit.js — auditDiscoveryUnlocks()"

This confirmed that the data is correct and the audit is the narrow party.

### Diff summary (single file, <=50 LOC delta)
- +1 import line: `import { WORLD_LOCATIONS } from '../data/worldMapData.js';`
- +26 lines in auditDiscoveryUnlocks() body:
  - Comment block citing discoveryUnlocks.js:14-21 with rationale
  - Data-source assertion: if regionIds.size===0 AND worldLocationIds is null, emit error and return early (loud failure on import breakage)
  - Fallback warning if WORLD_LOCATIONS is not importable (degrades gracefully, but warns)
  - `validKeys = new Set([...regionIds, ...(worldLocationIds || [])])` — the union
  - Key check updated: `!validKeys.has(regionId)` instead of `!regionIds.has(regionId)`
  - Error message updated to reference both sources
- -2 lines: removed the old `const regionIds` inside try{} and the old key-check block
- Net LOC delta: approximately +25 lines

### Union check uses both data sources at runtime
Both REGIONS (from regions.js) and WORLD_LOCATIONS (from worldMapData.js) are statically imported at the top of runtimeAudit.js. The union set is computed at function-call time from the live module-level values — not from hardcoded copies. Any future additions to either data file will be picked up automatically on the next boot.

### Expected result after fix
The 4 DISCOVERY_UNLOCKS keys in discoveryUnlocks.js are:
  - desert_foraging  -> WORLD_LOCATIONS id -> validKeys: PASS
  - copper_mine      -> WORLD_LOCATIONS id -> validKeys: PASS
  - salt_river       -> WORLD_LOCATIONS id -> validKeys: PASS
  - mountain_range   -> WORLD_LOCATIONS id -> validKeys: PASS (also pending:true, so quest check skipped)

All 4 previously-false-positive ERRORs are eliminated. mountain_range has pending:true so the quest-ref check is also correctly skipped.

### Verdict
static-only-fix. Runtime validation (boot the game, confirm 0 DISCOVERY_UNLOCKS errors in console) is the user's job.
